chapter_title.ar: بَابُ السَّعْيِ بَيْنَ الصَّفَا وَ الْمَرْوَةِ وَ مَا يُقَالُ فِيهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 142 – The Sa’ee between Al-Safa and Al-Marwa and what is to be said during it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/73)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/73)

parts.text: مَوْلًى لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مِنْ أَهْلِ الْمَدِينَةِ

text: رَأَيْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) يَبْتَدِئُ بِالسَّعْيِ مِنْ دَارِ الْقَاضِي الْمَخْزُومِيِّ قَالَ وَ يَمْضِي كَمَا هُوَ إِلَى زُقَاقِ الْعَطَّارِينَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ali Bin Asbaat, from a friend of Abu Abdullahasws, from the people of Al Medina who said,

‘I saw Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> beginning the Sa’ee from the door of Al-Qazy Al-Makhzoumy’. He said, ‘And he<sup>asws</sup> went on just as he<sup>asws</sup> was, up to the alleyway of the perfume sellers’.
en.sarwar: 7. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ali ibn Asbat from Mawla’ abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, from people of al-Madinah who has said the following: “I saw abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, perform Sa‘y (walking faster like running slowly) from the house of al-Qadiy al-Makhzumiy.’ He has said that he (the Imam) continued until he reached the lane of al-‘Attarin (perfume sellers).”’
